name: weave-monorepo
description: Weave — fine-grained reactive, signal-native UI framework. Compiled, TypeScript-first, no Virtual DOM.

scripts.verify:ls: node packages/language-server/build.mjs && node tools/verify-language-server.mjs && node tools/verify-ls-push-diagnostics.mjs
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/runtime/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/compiler/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/check/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/store/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/router/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/forms/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/data/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/language-server/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/typescript-plugin/tsconfig.json
